title: RYR1 / desflurane
summary: Patients with the rs121918592 AA genotype may develop malignant hyperthermia when treated with volatile anesthetics (desflurane, enflurane, halothane, isoflurane, methoxyflurane, sevoflurane) and/or succinylcholine as compared to patients with genotype GG. Other genetic or clinical factors may also influence the risk for malignant hyperthermia.
